archived_by: PM (qc-consolidated verdict: Approve after W-1+W-2 targeted re-review)

residual_findings.title: ForeshadowingRow.status is String; overlay defines closed vocabulary (planned|buried|paid_off) but runtime does not validate
residual_findings.source: qc1 W-1 (architecture/maintainability); raised in wave-1 (2026-06-17) qc-consolidated.md
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P1 W-1 fix wave (commit 3f2efc03, merged at 1fee7ada): typed ForeshadowingStatus enum { Planned, Buried, PaidOff } with case-insensitive FromStr + canonical Display. ForeshadowingRow.status: String → ForeshadowingStatus. parse_foreshadowing_index returns Result<Vec<_>, IndexParseError> with InvalidStatus { row_index, value } for unknown values. serialize uses Display. 5 new tests: parse_foreshadowing_index_rejects_unknown_status, parse_foreshadowing_index_accepts_all_known_statuses, serialize_then_parse_roundtrip_preserves_known_statuses, foreshadowing_status_display_is_canonical_lowercase, foreshadowing_status_fromstr_is_case_insensitive. All 31 narrative_index lib tests + 52 stage_gates + 22 novel_project_init + 11 e2e_novel_writing pass. Targeted re-review: qc-specialist Approve @ 8f2de9b4.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ 1fee7ada (merge) + 3f2efc03 (fix commit) + 8f2de9b4 (qc1 re-review); qc-consolidated.md re-review Approve verdict

residual_findings.title: extract_inline_f_declarations / promote_outline_to_index over-allocates: bullets without explicit F### token receive new F### ids (silent index corruption)
residual_findings.source: qc1 W-2 (architecture/maintainability); raised in wave-1 (2026-06-17) qc-consolidated.md
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P1 W-2 fix wave (commit 3f2efc03, merged at 1fee7ada): parse_declaration_line requires explicit F### token; prose/notes/TODOs/parentheticals ignored; promote_outline_to_index no longer allocates ids for non-F### bullets. 3 new tests: extract_inline_f_declarations_ignores_bullets_without_f_token, extract_inline_f_declarations_handles_bullet_with_existing_f_id, promote_outline_to_index_does_not_allocate_for_prose_bullets. Targeted re-review: qc-specialist Approve @ 8f2de9b4.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ 1fee7ada (merge) + 3f2efc03 (fix commit) + 8f2de9b4 (qc1 re-review); qc-consolidated.md re-review Approve verdict
